use_cases: File browser UI for cyberpunk or futuristic-themed applications
Folder selection cards in file management systems
Project explorer components for developer tools
Data organization interfaces with distinctive visual styling
Document management cards in media applications
ai_summary: A cyberpunk-styled folder card component featuring neon glow effects, layered document sheets, and futuristic Orbitron typography. The component displays a file folder with stacked document previews, using a dark purple gradient background with grid overlay patterns. Designed for file management interfaces in gaming, dev-tools, and SaaS applications requiring distinctive, high-impact visual styling.
